mapper.select: SELECT mc.id, mc.member_id, mc.template_id, mc.status, mc.acquired_at, mc.used_at, mc.expire_at, mc.order_id, ct.name AS coupon_name, ct.type AS coupon_type, ct.threshold, ct.discount, ct.reduce_amount FROM member_coupon mc JOIN coupon_template ct ON mc.template_id = ct.id WHERE mc.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY mc.status ASC, mc.expire_at ASC

SELECT mc.id, mc.member_id, mc.template_id, mc.status, mc.acquired_at, mc.used_at, mc.expire_at, mc.order_id, ct.name AS coupon_name, ct.type AS coupon_type, ct.threshold, ct.discount, ct.reduce_amount FROM member_coupon mc JOIN coupon_template ct ON mc.template_id = ct.id WHERE mc.member_id = #{memberId} AND mc.status = 1 AND mc.expire_at > NOW() ORDER BY ct.type, ct.threshold DESC
